name: Mortal Kombat (Master System)
description: SMS port of MK. Surprisingly solid. HP tracking same concept as SNES version.

tournament_modes.name: Best of 3 Rounds
tournament_modes.description: First player to win 2 rounds wins.

notes: SMS Action Replay format: 00C4-88XX = address 0xC488, value 0xXX
Blood code: At title screen: Up, Up, Down, Down, Left, Right, Left, Right
Backup option if SNES MK ROM not available — same game concept
